name: ComCare Short-to-Medium-Term Assistance
summary: Temporary support for people and families unable to work, seeking work, or earning a low income.

hard_ceilings.rule: Applicant must be a Singapore Citizen, or a PR with at least one Singapore Citizen household member.

flexible_criteria.note: A guideline; exceptional medical or rental expenses may be considered.

flexible_criteria.benchmark: Job-seeking or medically unable to work
flexible_criteria.note: Caregiving and other personal constraints are considered holistically.

name: ComCare Long-Term Assistance
summary: Long-term support for people permanently unable to work with little income or family support.

hard_ceilings.rule: Applicant must be a Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident.
Formal medical certification of permanent unfitness to work is required.

flexible_criteria.benchmark: Children's PCHI at or below S$800
flexible_criteria.note: Estrangement or children's heavy financial or medical burdens may be considered.
Minor passive income is evaluated contextually.

name: MediFund
summary: Help with public healthcare bills after other subsidies and means of payment.

hard_ceilings.rule: Applicant must be a Singapore Citizen.
Treatment must be at an approved public or subsidised healthcare institution.

flexible_criteria.note: A Medical Social Worker reviews bill size, savings and disposable income.

name: Community Health Assist Scheme (CHAS)
summary: Subsidies at participating GP and dental clinics.

hard_ceilings.rule: Applicant must be a Singapore Citizen.

flexible_criteria.benchmark: Blue ≤ S$1,500; Orange S$1,501–S$2,300; Green above S$2,300
flexible_criteria.note: Households can appeal after an abrupt financial change.

name: MOE Financial Assistance Scheme
summary: School fee assistance for lower-income families with children in primary or secondary school.

hard_ceilings.rule: Student must be a Singapore Citizen.
Student must attend a Government or Government-aided school.

flexible_criteria.note: School-Based FAS may cover families in distress above the benchmark.

name: Student Care Fee Assistance
summary: Fee support for eligible children enrolled in registered Student Care Centres.

hard_ceilings.rule: Child must attend an MSF-registered Student Care Centre.
Child must be a Citizen or PR with a Citizen family member.

flexible_criteria.note: May be relaxed for job-seeking, medical unfitness or full-time caregiving.

flexible_criteria.benchmark: GHI ≤ S$4,500 or PCI ≤ S$1,125 for households of 5+
flexible_criteria.note: Special approval can address unique crises.

name: Kindergarten / Preschool Fee Assistance
summary: Fee assistance for Singaporean children at eligible preschools and kindergartens.

hard_ceilings.rule: Child must be a Singapore Citizen.
Child must attend an eligible licensed preschool or kindergarten.

flexible_criteria.benchmark: GHI up to S$12,000 or PCI up to S$3,000 for households of 5+
flexible_criteria.note: Special subsidies may apply for job-seeking, incapacity, legal issues, ComCare recipients or public-rental households.

name: ComLink+ Destitute Support
summary: Goal-based, coordinated support for families facing severe hardship.

hard_ceilings.rule: Family unit must include at least one Singapore Citizen.

flexible_criteria.note: Support is coordinated around qualitative milestones with a Family Coach.
